ideas.idea: Asher at the end of the film wearing a new set of headphones - but were Dallas' original headphones
ideas.notes: Inheritance/passing on moment - Asher now has Dallas' original headphones

ideas.idea: Dominic shows Dallas picture of his wife, then shows Makayla and Asher with their mother, reveals 'that was my little sister' and says 'now we're just a family of death'
ideas.notes: Expands s07 photo moment - reveals family connection & loss. Adds emotional weight to why Dominic raised Makayla and Asher
